name: evidence-harvest-unblocks-freshness
doc: The v0.1.51 retroactive-harvest parcours (core scope). A code Write is first blocked by the freshness gate (no explore/research evidence). A SubagentStop carrying agent_transcript_path harvests the finishing sub-agent's OWN transcript into the session track (evidence-harvest-io.ts:37 harvestSubagentTrack → evidence-harvest.ts, dispatched at dispatch.ts:62 BEFORE the reminder). The transcript's Glob + exa tool_uses classify as explore-codebase + research-expert (explore-tools.ts:82-83), forced `sufficient` on harvest (evidence-harvest.ts:39). The SAME Write then advances PAST freshnessGate — and stops at the NEXT gate, Check-1 doc consultation ("APEX: <fw> documentation required", gate-apex.ts:70-75, apexauth-evidence.test.ts:81-88). The block MOVING from explore→documentation is the proof the harvest credited freshness. NOTE: harvest credits AGENTS only, never doc consultation (recordDoc), so a full allow additionally needs the doc gate satisfied — see 08 for that. The transcript fixture has NO timestamps on purpose: harvest stamps evidence at the SubagentStop's own now (evidence-harvest.ts:35 fallbackNow), keeping it fresh for the next step. aipilot scope would SKIP the harvest (dispatch.ts:56-57 returns "") — this must run in core.

steps.doc: Fresh session, no evidence → freshnessGate blocks (apex-gates.ts:68-77 "APEX: explore + research required"). react .ts (detect-framework.ts:6) with plain content reaches apexScopedGate (proven by test/handle.test.ts:34).

tool_input.content:
a
b
c
d
e
f

steps.doc: SubagentStop with agent_transcript_path → harvest records explore + research into trackFile(sc07). agent_type=research-expert is in SKIP_AGENTS so trackAgentMemory returns {message:"Agent research-expert completed"} (agent-memory.ts:48) — but the harvest ran FIRST regardless.

The SAME Write now clears freshnessGate (harvested evidence) and hits Check-1 doc consultation → "APEX: react documentation required" (title contains 'documentation'). This Write repeats step 1's identical payload, so the anti-loop also prefixes [REPEAT] — harmless, the title substring 'documentation' still holds (deny-loop.ts:70 keeps the title).
